positive: A whimsical and symmetrical scene featuring a collection of stylized woodland creatures (fox, deer, owl, bear cub) gathered around a glowing, enchanted mushroom cluster. The style is modern botanical illustration meets kawaii gothic. The composition should be circular and centered, ideal for a chest print. Use clean, bold silhouettes with intricate line work and minimal gradients. The color palette must be limited to deep forest emerald, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and cream, creating high contrast against a neutral background. Perfect for screen printing on dark apparel. Flat depth, highly detailed, vector art aesthetic, symmetrical composition, intricate line art, clean lines, graphic design.
